const colors = ['var(--border-color-light)','rgba(26,187,156,0.25)','rgba(26,187,156,0.5)','rgba(26,187,156,0.75)','var(--primary)']; const heatmap = document.getElementById('heatmap'); let html = ''; for (let i = 0; i < 140; i++) { const lvl = Math.floor(Math.random() * 5); html += ``; } heatmap.innerHTML = html;
